language.for.newline_form:
for i in 1 2 3
do
  echo $i
done > nums.txt
language.for.quoted_values: for i in "one two" three; do echo "$i"; done > words.txt
language.for.append_existing: for i in 1 2 3; do echo $i; done >> seq.txt
language.for.empty_list: for i in; do echo $i; done > empty.txt
language.for.values_from_subst: for i in $(printf 'b a c'); do echo $i; done | sort > vals.txt
language.func.multiline_body: pair(){ echo left; echo right; }; pair > pair.txt
language.func.calls_function: a(){ echo A; }; b(){ a; echo B; }; b > ab.txt
language.func.pipeline_transform: greet(){ echo hi; }; greet | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]' > up.txt
language.func.positional_all_args: showall(){ echo "$@"; }; showall one "two words" three > allargs.txt
language.func.positional_arg_count: argc(){ echo "$#"; }; argc a b c > argc.txt
language.if.basic_then_else: if test -f flag.txt; then echo yes > result.txt; else echo no > result.txt; fi
language.while.counter: i=1; while [ $i -le 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$((i+1)); done > while.txt
language.func.return_status_chain: failer(){ false; }; failer || echo recovered > status.txt
language.jobs.multi_background_wait: sleep 0.1 & sleep 0.1 & wait; echo done > done.txt
language.pipe_and_chain_success: printf 'a\n' | grep a && echo ok > ok.txt
language.if.elif_branch: if false; then echo no > elif.txt; elif true; then echo elif-hit > elif.txt; else echo no > elif.txt; fi
language.until.counter: i=1; until [ $i -gt 3 ]; do echo $i; i=$((i+1)); done > until.txt
language.case.pattern_branch: name=notes.md; case $name in *.md) echo md > case.txt ;; *.txt) echo txt > case.txt ;; *) echo other > case.txt ;; esac
language.for.c_style_counter: for ((i=1; i<=3; i++)); do echo $i; done > cfor.txt
language.func.keyword_form: function greet { echo hi; }; greet > func_kw.txt
language.func.local_scope_shadow: x=outer; function show { local x=inner; echo $x; }; show > local_scope.txt; echo $x >> local_scope.txt
language.arith.bitwise_ops: echo $((5 & 3)) > bitwise.txt; echo $((5 | 2)) >> bitwise.txt; echo $((5 ^ 1)) >> bitwise.txt
language.ln.hard_link_shared_content: ln hard_src.txt hard_link.txt && echo two >> hard_src.txt
